Title: Lupin III: The Castle of Cagliostro
Writer: Monkey Punch, Maurice Leblanc, Hayao Miyazaki
Actors: Yasuo Yamada, Eiko Masuyama, Kiyoshi Kobayashi
Plot: A dashing thief, his gang of desperadoes and an intrepid cop struggle to free a princess from an evil count, and learn the secret of a treasure that she holds part of the key to.
